revision.text:
'''山田神社'''（やまたじんじゃ / やまだじんじゃ）は[[神社]]。
* [[山田神社 (横浜市)]] - 神奈川県横浜市都筑区南山田町鎮座、神饌幣帛料指定神社・旧村社 * [[山田神社 (枚方市山之上)]] - 大阪府枚方市山之上鎮座、旧村社 * [[山田神社 (枚方市田口)]] - 大阪府枚方市田口鎮座、旧村社 * [[山田神社 (山口市)]] - 山口県山口市阿東地福上鎮座 * 山田神社 (周防国) - 周防国の国史見在社 ** [[山田神社 (周防大島町)]] - 山口県大島郡周防大島町外入鎮座、上記論社 ** 山田神社 (鹿野町) - 山口県周南市（旧都濃郡鹿野町）に鎮座していた上記論社 ⇒ [[二所山田神社]] * [[山田神社 (観音寺市)]] - 香川県観音寺市柞田町鎮座、式内社・旧郷社
{{曖昧さ回避}} {{デフォルトソート:やまたしんしや}} [[Category:同名の神社]]

'''Yamada Shrine''' (山田神社) refers to various {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社}} located across Japan.
* **Kanagawa Prefecture** * {{ill|Yamada Shrine (Yokohama City)|ja|山田神社 (横浜市)}} - Located in Minamiyamada Town, {{ill|Tsuzuki Ward|ja|都筑区}}, Yokohama City. A shrine designated for offerings and former village shrine.
* **Osaka Prefecture** * {{ill|Yamada Shrine (Hirakata City Yamanoue)|ja|山田神社 (枚方市山之上)}} - Located in Yamanoue, {{ill|Hirakata City|ja|枚方市}}. A former village shrine. * {{ill|Yamada Shrine (Hirakata City Taguchi)|ja|山田神社 (枚方市田口)}} - Located in Taguchi, Hirakata City. A former village shrine.
* **Yamaguchi Prefecture** * {{ill|Yamada Shrine (Yamaguchi City)|ja|山田神社 (山口市)}} - Located in Ato Jifuku Kami, {{ill|Yamaguchi City|ja|山口市}}. * **Yamada Shrine (Suō Province)** - A shrine listed in the historical records of Suō Province. * {{ill|Yamada Shrine (Suō-Ōshima Town)|ja|山田神社 (周防大島町)}} - Located in Sotoiri, Suō-Ōshima Town, Ōshima District, Yamaguchi Prefecture. * '''Kanagawa Prefecture''' ** {{ill|Yamada Shrine (Yokohama City)|ja|山田神社 (横浜市)|12=draft}} - Located in Minamiyamada Town, {{ill|Tsuzuki Ward|ja|都筑区|12=draft}}, Yokohama City. A shrine designated for offerings and former village shrine.

* '''Yamaguchi Prefecture''' ** {{ill|Yamada Shrine (Yamaguchi City)|ja|山田神社 (山口市)|12=draft}} - Located in Ato Jifuku Kami, {{ill|Yamaguchi City|ja|山口市|12=draft}}. ** '''Yamada Shrine (Suō Province)''' - A shrine listed in the historical records of Suō Province. *** {{ill|Yamada Shrine (Suō-Ōshima Town)|ja|山田神社 (周防大島町)|12=draft}} - Located in Sotoiri, Suō-Ōshima Town, Ōshima District, Yamaguchi Prefecture. revision.text:
'''Yamada Shrine''' (山田神社) refers to various {{ill|Shinto shrines|ja|神社|12=draft}} located across Japan.
* '''Kanagawa Prefecture''' ** {{ill|Yamada Shrine (Yokohama City)|ja|山田神社 (横浜市)|12=draft}} - Located in Minamiyamada Town, {{ill|Tsuzuki Ward|ja|都筑区|12=draft}}, Yokohama City. A shrine designated for offerings and former village shrine.
* '''Osaka Prefecture''' ** {{ill|Yamada Shrine (Hirakata City Yamanoue)|ja|山田神社 (枚方市山之上)|12=draft}} - Located in Yamanoue, {{ill|Hirakata City|ja|枚方市|12=draft}}. A former village shrine. ** {{ill|Yamada Shrine (Hirakata City Taguchi)|ja|山田神社 (枚方市田口)|12=draft}} - Located in Taguchi, Hirakata City. A former village shrine.
* '''Yamaguchi Prefecture''' ** {{ill|Yamada Shrine (Yamaguchi City)|ja|山田神社 (山口市)|12=draft}} - Located in Ato Jifuku Kami, {{ill|Yamaguchi City|ja|山口市|12=draft}}. ** '''Yamada Shrine (Suō Province)''' - A shrine listed in the historical records of Suō Province. *** {{ill|Yamada Shrine (Suō-Ōshima Town)|ja|山田神社 (周防大島町)|12=draft}} - Located in Sotoiri, Suō-Ōshima Town, Ōshima District, Yamaguchi Prefecture. A candidate for the above shrine. *** {{ill|Yamada Shrine (Shikano Town)|ja|山田神社 (鹿野町)|12=draft}} - Previously located in Shikano Town, now part of Shunan City, Yamaguchi Prefecture. Referred to as {{ill|Nisho Yamada Shrine|ja|二所山田神社|12=draft}}.
* '''Kagawa Prefecture''' ** {{ill|Yamada Shrine (Kanonji City)|ja|山田神社 (観音寺市)|12=draft}} - Located in Kuda Town, {{ill|Kanonji City|ja|観音寺市|12=draft}}. A former village shrine and a {{ill|Shikinai shrine|ja|式内社|12=draft}}. {{citation needed|Yamada Shrine}}
[[simple:user:immanuelle/山田神社]] <!--Yamada Shrine--><!--Yamada Shrine--><!--Yamada Shrine-->

revision.comment: Bot: single‑shot reformat + ill→|12=draft + draft categories + iws + DEFAULTSORT + move HTML comments + meta‑cat check
Removing from [[Category:Pages without meta categories]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
9 revisions imported: Bot: import full history from ja:山田神社 up to rev 40698082
revision.text:
'''山田神社'''（やまたじんじゃ / やまだじんじゃ）は[[神社]]。
* [[山田神社 (横浜市)]] - 神奈川県横浜市都筑区南山田町鎮座、神饌幣帛料指定神社・旧村社 * [[山田神社 (枚方市山之上)]] - 大阪府枚方市山之上鎮座、旧村社 * [[山田神社 (枚方市田口)]] - 大阪府枚方市田口鎮座、旧村社 * [[山田神社 (山口市)]] - 山口県山口市阿東地福上鎮座 * 山田神社 (周防国) - 周防国の国史見在社 ** [[山田神社 (周防大島町)]] - 山口県大島郡周防大島町外入鎮座、上記論社 ** 山田神社 (鹿野町) - 山口県周南市（旧都濃郡鹿野町）に鎮座していた上記論社 ⇒ [[二所山田神社]] * [[山田神社 (観音寺市)]] - 香川県観音寺市柞田町鎮座、式内社・旧郷社
{{曖昧さ回避}} {{デフォルトソート:やまたしんしや}} [[Category:同名の神社]]

revision.comment: Immanuelle moved page [[山田神社]] to [[Yamada Shrine]] without leaving a redirect: Bot: merge import
revision.text:
'''山田神社'''（やまたじんじゃ / やまだじんじゃ）は[[神社]]。
* [[山田神社 (横浜市)]] - 神奈川県横浜市都筑区南山田町鎮座、神饌幣帛料指定神社・旧村社 * [[山田神社 (枚方市山之上)]] - 大阪府枚方市山之上鎮座、旧村社 * [[山田神社 (枚方市田口)]] - 大阪府枚方市田口鎮座、旧村社 * [[山田神社 (山口市)]] - 山口県山口市阿東地福上鎮座 * 山田神社 (周防国) - 周防国の国史見在社 ** [[山田神社 (周防大島町)]] - 山口県大島郡周防大島町外入鎮座、上記論社 ** 山田神社 (鹿野町) - 山口県周南市（旧都濃郡鹿野町）に鎮座していた上記論社 ⇒ [[二所山田神社]] * [[山田神社 (観音寺市)]] - 香川県観音寺市柞田町鎮座、式内社・旧郷社
{{曖昧さ回避}} {{デフォルトソート:やまたしんしや}} [[Category:同名の神社]]

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:山田神社]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[d:Q11470580]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:24, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Yamada Shrine''' (山田神社) refers to various [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrines]] located across Japan.
* '''Kanagawa Prefecture''' ** {{ill|Yamada Shrine (Yokohama City)|ja|山田神社 (横浜市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamada Shrine (Yokohama City)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Minamiyamada Town, [[:en:Tsuzuki-ku, Yokohama|Tsuzuki Ward]], Yokohama City. A shrine designated for offerings and former village shrine.
* '''Osaka Prefecture''' ** {{ill|Yamada Shrine (Hirakata City Yamanoue)|ja|山田神社 (枚方市山之上)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamada Shrine (Hirakata City Yamanoue)|qq=|1=Yamada Shrine (Hirataka)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11470582}} - Located in Yamanoue, [[:en:Hirakata|Hirakata City]]. A former village shrine. ** {{ill|Yamada Shrine (Hirakata City Taguchi)|ja|山田神社 (枚方市田口)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamada Shrine (Hirakata City Taguchi)|qq=|1=Yamada Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11470583}} - Located in Taguchi, Hirakata City. A former village shrine.
* '''Yamaguchi Prefecture''' ** {{ill|Yamada Shrine (Yamaguchi City)|ja|山田神社 (山口市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamada Shrine (Yamaguchi City)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Ato Jifuku Kami, [[:en:Yamaguchi (city)|Yamaguchi City]]. ** '''Yamada Shrine (Suō Province)''' - A shrine listed in the historical records of Suō Province. *** {{ill|Yamada Shrine (Suō-Ōshima Town)|ja|山田神社 (周防大島町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamada Shrine (Suō-Ōshima Town)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Sotoiri, Suō-Ōshima Town, Ōshima District, Yamaguchi Prefecture. A candidate for the above shrine. *** {{ill|Yamada Shrine (Shikano Town)|ja|山田神社 (鹿野町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamada Shrine (Shikano Town)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Previously located in Shikano Town, now part of Shunan City, Yamaguchi Prefecture. Referred to as {{ill|Nisho Yamada Shrine|ja|二所山田神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nisho Yamada Shrine|qq=}}.
* '''Kagawa Prefecture''' ** {{ill|Yamada Shrine (Kanonji City)|ja|山田神社 (観音寺市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamada Shrine (Kanonji City)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Kuda Town, [[:en:Kan'onji, Kagawa|Kanonji City]]. A former village shrine and a {{ill|Shikinai shrine|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|qq=draft|1=Shikinaisha|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinai shrine|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}}.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:山田神社]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:山田神社]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:山田神社]]
'''Yamada Shrine''' (山田神社) refers to various {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|WD=Q845945|lt=Shinto shrines|1=Shinto shrine}} located across Japan.
* '''Kanagawa Prefecture''' ** {{ill|Yamada Shrine (Yokohama City)|ja|山田神社 (横浜市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamada Shrine (Yokohama City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Minamiyamada Town, {{ill|Tsuzuki-ku, Yokohama|en|Tsuzuki-ku, Yokohama|WD=Q1153920|lt=Tsuzuki Ward|1=Tsuzuki-ku, Yokohama}}, Yokohama City. A shrine designated for offerings and former village shrine.
* '''Osaka Prefecture''' ** {{ill|Yamada Shrine (Hirakata City Yamanoue)|ja|山田神社 (枚方市山之上)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamada Shrine (Hirakata City Yamanoue)|1=Yamada Shrine (Hirataka)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11470582}} - Located in Yamanoue, {{ill|Hirakata|en|Hirakata|WD=Q270912|lt=Hirakata City|1=Hirakata}}. A former village shrine. ** {{ill|Yamada Shrine (Hirakata City Taguchi)|ja|山田神社 (枚方市田口)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamada Shrine (Hirakata City Taguchi)|1=Yamada Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11470583}} - Located in Taguchi, Hirakata City. A former village shrine.
* '''Yamaguchi Prefecture''' ** {{ill|Yamada Shrine (Yamaguchi City)|ja|山田神社 (山口市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamada Shrine (Yamaguchi City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Ato Jifuku Kami, {{ill|Yamaguchi (city)|en|Yamaguchi (city)|WD=Q207876|lt=Yamaguchi City|1=Yamaguchi (city)}}. ** '''Yamada Shrine (Suō Province)''' - A shrine listed in the historical records of Suō Province. *** {{ill|Yamada Shrine (Suō-Ōshima Town)|ja|山田神社 (周防大島町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamada Shrine (Suō-Ōshima Town)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Sotoiri, Suō-Ōshima Town, Ōshima District, Yamaguchi Prefecture. A candidate for the above shrine. *** {{ill|Yamada Shrine (Shikano Town)|ja|山田神社 (鹿野町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamada Shrine (Shikano Town)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Previously located in Shikano Town, now part of Shunan City, Yamaguchi Prefecture. Referred to as {{ill|Nisho Yamada Shrine|ja|二所山田神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nisho Yamada Shrine|qq=}}.
* '''Kagawa Prefecture''' ** {{ill|Yamada Shrine (Kanonji City)|ja|山田神社 (観音寺市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamada Shrine (Kanonji City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Kuda Town, {{ill|Kan'onji, Kagawa|en|Kan'onji, Kagawa|WD=Q861270|lt=Kanonji City|1=Kan'onji, Kagawa}}. A former village shrine and a {{ill|Shikinai shrine|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|1=Shikinaisha|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinai shrine|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}}.
{{disambiguation}}
